programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: The team is close, but stuck between options; do they choose confidently -- or second-guess until time runs out?

programme.desc: TMZ TV tracks down today's hottest stars with their cameras, whether they are hitting the clubs or the dry cleaners.

programme.desc: Rescue dogs at Yellowstone National Park, and how rangers manage trails in harsh winter conditions; rangers keep visitors safe at parks in Hawaii and Utah.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: The world's largest flying observatory; an underwater habitat nearly a mile underground.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Robots' inventors look toward nature to see how animals can help them to do the things that humans cannot.

programme.desc: A dog named Huck needs a prosthetic; a doberman pincher named Fudge needs a brace.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Exploring the phenomenon of ex-pats from the U.S. and worldwide moving to Portugal.

programme.title: Live: MLS Soccer
programme.desc: Sporting Kansas City (1-1-7) hosts Seattle Sounders FC (6-1-1) at Children's Mercy Park for Matchday 11. Seattle enters in excellent form after a 2-1 win over FC Dallas. Sporting Kansas City is struggling through a five-game losing streak.

programme.title: Live: MLS Soccer
programme.desc: Real Salt Lake (5-1-3) faces the Portland Timbers (3-1-5) at America First Field. Both teams seek to improve their Western Conference standings. RSL looks to bounce back from a 2-1 loss to the LA Galaxy that ended a five-match unbeaten streak.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Busch Stadium in St. Louis.

programme.desc: Live and breaking news for New York City and the surrounding area.

programme.title: The Sunday Mass

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. The program can be seen in more than 100 countries. Osteen urges people to live at their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Amazing Facts
programme.desc: Bible study proclaims God's good news to the world.

programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. programme.desc: Jerusalem's role in both world and biblical history, and in the events surrounding the return of Jesus Christ.

programme.desc: The Storm host the Stallions in Week 6. Orlando looks to sweep the season series following a 16-0 shutout win over Birmingham on April 18. Orlando's quarterback Jack Plummer has 996 passing yards and eight touchdowns in this campaign.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
